languages.text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."
"It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."
"It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."
"It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

languages.text: “成了！机魂有反应了！电梯正在启动。”
languages.original_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: “成了！机魂有反应了！电梯正在启动。”

languages.text: "İşe yaradı! Makine ruhu cevap veriyor! Asansörü çalıştırıyorum."
languages.original_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: "İşe yaradı! Makine ruhu cevap veriyor! Asansörü çalıştırıyorum."

languages.text: « Ça a fonctionné ! L'esprit de la machine a répondu ! Je vais tout de suite démarrer l'ascenseur. »
languages.original_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: « Ça a fonctionné ! L'esprit de la machine a répondu ! Je vais tout de suite démarrer l'ascenseur. »

languages.text: «¡Ha funcionado! ¡El espíritu máquina responde! Activando el ascensor».
languages.original_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: «¡Ha funcionado! ¡El espíritu máquina responde! Activando el ascensor».

languages.text: "Es hat funktioniert! Der Maschinengeist reagiert! Starte jetzt den Aufzug."
languages.original_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: "Es hat funktioniert! Der Maschinengeist reagiert! Starte jetzt den Aufzug."

languages.text: 「うまくいった！ 機械精霊が応答する！ 今、昇降機を起動します」
languages.original_text: "It worked! The machine spirit responds! Starting the lift now."

traits.locale_text: 「うまくいった！ 機械精霊が応答する！ 今、昇降機を起動します」
